name: Masar Dal
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the lentils thoroughly.
2. Place them in a deep pot with turmeric and 5 cups of water.
3. Bring to a boil, stirring often.
4. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 15 to 20 minutes.
5. Turn off the heat and beat the lentils with a wire whisk until smooth.
6. Stir in salt.
7. When ready to serve, reheat the puree until piping hot.
8. Heat ghee in a skillet.
9. Add garlic slices when hot and fry until they start to turn brown.
10. Pour this over the lentil puree.
11. Mix gently and serve.
